title: Combat mod
description: A few new weapons and two new tiers :3
body:
Adds new weapons and armor
Doesn't add much
Might update it later if I'm not busy

Future plans:
- Structures
- New monsters
- More new weapons and armor
- A multi-block crafting station

(Fingers crossed I figure out mob AI to add them)
[NOTE: The Discord invite leads to a server where I upload ALL my mods, not just this mod!]
